fields.field: {cimerant:type=field, comment=创建时间, default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), fieldType=DATETIME, nullable=false}
{cimerant:type=field, comment=更新时间, default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), fieldType=DATETIME, nullable=false}
{cimerant:type=field, comment=0-有效记录, 1-删除, default=_UTF8MB4'0', fieldType=TINYINT, nullable=false, precision=1}
{cimerant:type=field, comment=唯一标识, fieldType=BIGINT, nullable=false, precision=19, primary=true, unsigned=true}
{cimerant:type=field, comment=文档所属层级，0-主关联文档， 1-次关联文档, default=_UTF8MB4'0', fieldType=TINYINT, precision=4, unsigned=true}
